projectDescription: An n8n community node package that connects AzuraCast web radio platform with n8n workflow automation, providing full coverage of 263 AzuraCast OpenAPI operations across 18+ resource domains.
keyFeatures: Full AzuraCast OpenAPI coverage with 263/263 operations
Single unified AzuraCast node with operations grouped by resource/tag
Automatic request field rendering from OpenAPI metadata (path, query, body parameters)
Support for JSON, raw, binary, and multipart form-data request bodies
Auto-detection of response format (JSON, text, binary)
Public endpoint access without API key; protected endpoints with X-API-Key and Bearer auth
Backward compatibility for legacy operationId and JSON parameter workflows
Usable as an AI tool node in n8n
publicApiSurface: createDomainOperationConfig(tag: string) — builds operation config for a resource tag
createUnifiedOperationConfig() — builds unified config for all resources
createResourceProperty() — returns n8n resource selector property
createResourceOperationProperty(tag, resourceValue?) — returns operation selector for a tag
createResourceFieldProperties(tag, resourceValue?) — returns field properties for a tag
createSharedAdvancedProperties() — returns shared advanced node properties
